name: -a
--all
options.description: Include entries whose names begin with a dot

name: -h
--human-readable
options.description: Print sizes in human readable units

options.name: -t
options.description: Sort by modification time, newest first

name: -S
options.description: Sort by file size, largest first

options.name: -r
options.description: Reverse the order of the sort

options.name: -d
options.description: List directories themselves, not their contents

options.name: -F
options.description: Append an indicator character to entries
